content.situation: 小组讨论结束后，你向组员表达感谢并准备告别
content.speakerText: Thanks for sharing your ideas today—it really helped me see things differently.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你们今天分享的想法，这让我对事情有了不同的看法。
content.responseTemplate: I really ______ your insights. Catch you later!
content.hint: 表达感谢时，常用动词是 appreciate，后面接名词或名词短语

content.situation: 课后你向教授致谢并准备离开，希望保持联系
content.speakerText: Your feedback on my project was incredibly helpful.
content.speakerTextCn: 你对我项目的反馈非常有帮助。
content.responseTemplate: Thank you! I’d love to ______ your advice in the future.
content.hint: 表示希望未来继续参考某人的建议，常用短语是 follow up on
content.knowledgePoint: 表达未来持续互动的礼貌短语

content.situation: 和同学结束学习小组会议，你想表达感谢并友好告别
content.speakerText: You all made this session so productive!
content.speakerTextCn: 你们让这次会议如此高效！
content.hint: 告别时最自然、最通用的表达是祝愿对方度过美好的一天
